title: Rotate Array
pattern: Array â€” In-place Rotation via Reversal
coreIdea: Rotate an array to the right by k steps in-place using O(1) extra space, by reversing the entire array, then reversing each of the two resulting segments (first k and remaining n-k elements) separately.
recognitionCues: asks to rotate an array in-place with O(1) extra space explicitly required
naive approach (extra array or repeated single shifts) hinted to be improved
approach: Normalize k = k % n. Reverse the entire array. Reverse the first k elements. Reverse the remaining n-k elements. This three-reversal trick produces the rotated array in-place.
